With an unwavering commitment to excellence in journalism, our team is at the forefront of gathering, verifying, and presenting breaking news, in-depth analysis, and insightful reports on a wide range of topics.

articles.title: ED breaks locks to enter Abhishek Banerjee's residence during overnight raid
articles.summary: A joint police team, including central forces, conducted an overnight search at Trinamool leader Abhishek Banerjee's Kolkata residence. The operation, linked to a Paschim Medinipur case, involved breaking locks after no response from occupants.

articles.title: NTA issues clarification on CUET PG 2026 rescheduled exams, says no score normalisation applied
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency has clarified CUET PG 2026 exam scheduling and score normalisation. A small number of candidates took a rescheduled exam due to unforeseen circumstances.

articles.title: Central Bank of India Apprentice recruitment 2026: Notification released for 4,500 posts; check eligibility, direct link
articles.summary: The Central Bank of India has announced 4,500 apprentice vacancies for the 2026-27 financial year, with online applications open from June 12 to June 22, 2026. The selection process includes an online exam, local language test, document verification, and medical assessment, with a monthly stipend of Rs 15,000 for the 12-month training period..

articles.title: RRB NTPC Graduate CBT 2 exam date 2026 announced: Check schedule, admit card details
articles.summary: Railway Recruitment Boards have announced the tentative schedule for the RRB NTPC Graduate CBT 2 examination, set to be conducted on July 10, 2026. Candidates who cleared the first stage will be eligible.

articles.title: IIT Kanpur opens walk-in admissions for PhD in Aerospace Engineering: Check how to apply
articles.summary: IIT Kanpur's Aerospace Engineering department is inviting applications for its PhD Walk-in Admissions Programme 2026, with registration closing on June 16. Eligible candidates from CFTIs and top-ranked non-CFTI institutions can apply for research opportunities.
